title: [phase:plan] [family:approval-tokens] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: openclaw-tmux replacement. Review the new prototype and propose the minimum scoped approval-token model to replace coarse --approve. Return concise bullets: token fields, validation rules, TTL, and how to bind token to action+...
summary_text: - `scripts/local/bootstrap-prod-secrets.sh` -> `scripts/local/sync-gh-secrets-from-env.sh` can set GitHub org var `FUGUE_NOTEBOOKLM_BIN`; workflow already consumes it at [notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml):127 and :148. - Existing resolver candidate binary paths (already wired): `${HOME}/.local/bin/nlm`, `${HOME}/bin/nlm`, `/usr/local/bin/nlm`, `/opt/homebrew/bin/nlm`, `/opt/local/bin/nlm` in [notebooklm-bin.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/notebooklm-bin.sh):39-43. - No existing repo path installs `nlm` on runner (no NotebookLM `ensure/install` script or workflow install step); if `nlm` is absent from all above paths, there is no repo-only bootstrap path to eliminate this blocker.
